phases.title: Update DEFAULT_SIZES constant
phases.content: Change apps/desktop/src/stores/layoutStore.ts DEFAULT_SIZES from `{ sidebar: 15, main: 70, detail: 15 }` to `{ sidebar: 15, main: 65, detail: 20 }`. Per issue body, do NOT bump the persist version — existing users keep their tuned layouts; new installs and Reset Layout clicks pick up the new defaults.
